milestoneTitle: Phase M9.17b.d — Retired swipe-left-mastery. The inline ✓ button from M9.17b.a is now the discoverable mastery path, so the whole swipe state machine (pending/swiping, touch + pointer event listeners, direction-commit logic, LEARN_SWIPE_THRESHOLD / LEARN_SWIPE_VERTICAL_SLOP / LEARN_GESTURE_SLOP constants, handleLearnSwipeLeft function) was deleted. wireLearnRowGestures collapsed to just the capture-phase click-suppression that blocks a head-link click after a drag. ~120 lines removed from js/app.js. Drag-to-reorder (M9.17b.b grab handle) and inline mastery button are both independent and still work.
